claims.claim: Fast track (מסלול מהיר) compensation ceiling is NIS 30,000 / 30,000 ש"ח / 30,000 שקל. Claims at or under this amount can use the fast track; larger claims must use the regular track. Single claim per household per incident.

Regular track (מסלול רגיל) has no ceiling for structural damage; contents capped by household composition. Used for claims above NIS 30,000 / 30,000 ש"ח / 30,000 שקל or requiring professional engineering assessment.

Optional Tax Authority war damage contents insurance premium rate is 0.3% of additional insured value per year. This is the only Israeli product covering war damage to home contents above the standard ceiling (regular home insurance excludes war damage).
Maximum insurable value under the Tax Authority optional war-damage contents insurance is approximately NIS 1,037,100 / 1,037,100 ש"ח / 1,037,100 שקל (2026 figure, updated periodically by CPI).

Maximum annual premium under the Tax Authority optional war-damage contents insurance is approximately NIS 3,111 / 3,111 ש"ח / 3,111 שקל (2026 figure, derived from 0.3% premium on the maximum insurable value of approximately NIS 1,037,100).
Total contents compensation ceiling for a single-person household is approximately 52,750 ש"ח / 52,750 שקל / 52,750 NIS (2026 estimate, updated periodically by Consumer Price Index).

Total contents compensation ceiling for a married couple or single-parent household is approximately 85,000 ש"ח / 85,000 שקל / 85,000 NIS (2026 estimate, updated periodically by Consumer Price Index).
Elderly relative supplement under the contents compensation ceilings is approximately 10,000 ש"ח / 10,000 שקל / 10,000 NIS per qualifying relative (2026 estimate).

Per-child (under 18) supplement to contents compensation ceiling is approximately 9,000 ש"ח / 9,000 שקל / 9,000 NIS additional per child (2026 estimate). Breakdown: ~5,200 ש"ח furniture + ~750 ש"ח clothing + balance across other categories.
Total contents compensation ceiling for a family of 4 (couple + 2 children) is approximately 103,000 ש"ח / 103,000 שקל / 103,000 NIS (2026 estimate, updated periodically by CPI).
Total contents compensation ceiling for a family of 5 (couple + 3 children) is approximately 150,000 ש"ח / 150,000 שקל / 150,000 NIS (2026 estimate, updated periodically by CPI).
Within the couple/single-parent compensation ceiling, the furniture (רהיטים) category is allocated approximately 25,000 NIS / 25,000 ש"ח / 25,000 שקל (2026 estimate).

Within the couple/single-parent compensation ceiling, the electrical appliances & electronics (מכשירי חשמל ואלקטרוניקה) category is allocated approximately 30,000 NIS / 30,000 ש"ח / 30,000 שקל (2026 estimate).
Per-child (under 18) furniture supplement is approximately 5,200 NIS / 5,200 ש"ח / 5,200 שקל (2026 estimate, component of the ~9,000 ש"ח per-child total).
Per-child (under 18) clothing supplement is approximately 750 NIS / 750 ש"ח / 750 שקל (2026 estimate, component of the ~9,000 ש"ח per-child total).
Illustrative example claim: rocket-blast damage where total damage is approximately 20,000 ש"ח / 20,000 שקל / NIS 20,000 — under the 30,000 NIS fast track ceiling. (Used as an example in the skill.)

Illustrative example: appeal scenario where claimant received NIS 15,000 / 15,000 ש"ח / 15,000 שקל compensation while damage was at least NIS 40,000 / 40,000 ש"ח / 40,000 שקל. (Used as an appeal example in the skill.)
Illustrative example damage estimate: NIS 40,000 / 40,000 ש"ח / 40,000 שקל — used in the appeal scenario where the awarded compensation was disputed as too low. (Used as an example in the skill.)

Illustrative example used in the Hebrew skill body: a couple with electronics worth 130,000 ש"ח / 130,000 שקל / 130,000 NIS, with the standard electronics ceiling at approximately 30,000 ש"ח. To insure the additional 100,000 ש"ח / 100,000 שקל / 100,000 NIS, the annual premium at the 0.3% rate is approximately 300 ש"ח / 300 שקל / 300 NIS.

The statutory basis for direct war-damage compensation in Israel is the Property Tax and Compensation Fund Law, 1961 (חוק מס רכוש וקרן פיצויים, תשכ"א-1961), which establishes the framework for property taxation and creates a compensation fund mechanism for war and hostility damage.
claims.raw_snippet: חוק מס רכוש וקרן פיצויים, תשכ"א-1961

claims.claim: תקנה 8 (Regulation 8) of the Property Tax Regulations 1973 (תקנות מס רכוש, התשל"ג-1973) addresses the manager's decision on claimant entitlement, compensation amounts, payment methods, and damage restoration — the manager may distribute funds among injured parties and condition payment on restoration completion.
claims.raw_snippet: תקנה 8 - החלטת המנהל ותשלום הפיצוי: המנהל מחליט על זכאות התובע, סכומי פיצוי, אופן התשלום ושיקום הנזק

claims.claim: תקנה 9 (Regulation 9) of the Property Tax Regulations 1973 permits the manager to correct decisions within a 4-year window if new facts emerged or there was an error; overpayments must be returned within 90 days.
claims.raw_snippet: תקנה 9 - תיקון החלטת המנהל: המנהל רשאי לתקן את החלטתו תוך ארבע שנים אם התגלו עובדות חדשות או הייתה טעות

claims.claim: תקנה 10 (Regulation 10) of the Property Tax Regulations 1973 historically established the Indirect Damage Committee (ועדה לנזק עקיף) composed of three members from the Defense, Finance, and Agriculture ministries; the regulation was subsequently repealed (בוטלה) and is no longer operative.
claims.raw_snippet: תקנה 10 - בוטלה. בנוסח קודם: הקמת ועדה לנזק עקיף בת שלושה חברים ממשרדי הביטחון, האוצר והחקלאות

claims.claim: Tax Authority (רשות המסים) customer service hotline is *4954, used for digital-services login issues and general support. Also referenced for Compensation Fund (קרן הפיצויים) questions.

Tax Authority direct-damage online claim filing page (הגשת תביעה מקוונת לנזק ישיר). Filing URL where users open Compensation Fund claims and receive the SMS photo-upload link for fast track submissions.
Israel Tax Authority (רשות המסים בישראל) departmental landing page on gov.il — primary reference for current compensation ceilings, deadline notices, and forms.
Nevo legal database canonical URL for the Property Tax and Compensation Fund Law, 1961 (חוק מס רכוש וקרן פיצויים, תשכ"א-1961). Verified to return the full law text including the title verbatim.
claims.raw_snippet: חוק מס רכוש וקרן פיצויים, תשכ"א-1961

claims.claim: Nevo legal database canonical URL for the Property Tax Regulations 1973 (תקנות מס רכוש, התשל"ג-1973). Verified to contain Regulations 8, 9, and 10 covering manager's decisions, correction window, and (repealed) indirect-damage committee composition.

State Comptroller (מבקר המדינה) report on Tax Authority emergency preparedness, January 2026. Published as part of the 2026 Emergency series. PDF returns HTTP 200 with Hebrew language metadata (he-IL) and a 2.6MB binary payload — body text not parseable via WebFetch but URL resolves.

Kol Zchut (כל זכות) page describing the small-business compensation track under the Tax Authority Compensation Fund — relevant for businesses with turnover below approximately NIS 300,000. Same wiki article is linked in two forms in the skill files: the percent-encoded canonical form https://www.kolzchut.org.il/he/%D7%A4%D7%99%D7%A6%D7%95%D7%99_%D7%9C%D7%A2%D7%A1%D7%A7%D7%99%D7%9D_%D7%A7%D7%98%D7%A0%D7%99%D7%9D and the rendered-Hebrew form https://www.kolzchut.org.il/he/פיצוי_לעסקים_קטנים.
